name: Cabbage-Pineapple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cabbage and pineapple with juice, sugar replacement, and salt.
2. Stir to dissolve sugar replacement. Allow to rest at room temperature for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
3. Drain thoroughly. Fold topping into cabbage mixture.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 FRUIT EXCHANGE CAL: 28
